codes.remediation: Provide all required inputs and rerun validation.
codes.when: A required input path or argument is missing.

codes.remediation: Correct argument values to documented ranges and formats.
codes.when: An input value is out of range, malformed, or unsupported.

codes.remediation: Assign CRS metadata (or EPSG override where supported) before rerun.
codes.when: CRS metadata required for harmonization is missing.

codes.remediation: Verify source CRS, extent validity, and raster/vector readability.
codes.when: Reprojection/harmonization to the reference grid fails.

codes.remediation: Check file existence, permissions, and format compatibility.
codes.when: A required raster/vector/JSON input cannot be read.

codes.remediation: Ensure output directories exist and are writable.
codes.when: An output artifact cannot be written.

codes.remediation: Inspect sub-tool logs and rerun with corrected inputs/parameters.
codes.when: An internal delegated sub-tool fails to complete.

codes.remediation: Relax masking/thresholds or provide higher-quality source data.
codes.when: Too few valid pixels/points remain for robust analysis.

codes.remediation: Review flagged zones and rerun with stricter profile/settings if needed.
codes.when: Outputs are produced but QA thresholds are not met.

codes.remediation: Capture logs, isolate reproducer inputs, and escalate for investigation.
codes.when: An unexpected internal execution error occurs.

terrain_adaptive_biomass.management_guidance: Use high and very_high biovolume fractions to prioritize fuel management or harvest planning zones; compare across adaptation modes for sensitivity.
terrain_adaptive_biomass.summary: Terrain adaptation adjusts biomass proxy using local canopy relief to reduce underestimation in heterogeneous stands.
